title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and autonomous coding capabilities, comparing them to Ralph-loop 2.0 and exploring practical setup and prompting techniques. The video covers goal-buddy functionality and mission exploration for long-horizon coding tasks.
